payload.answer: Extracted two high-level principles: (1) Brain DB as source of truth; (2) cognition as a rebuildable projection. Kept wording close to OCR due to noise.

payload.intent: Extract and normalize meaning from noisy OCR text into Brain memory assertions.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain database is the (intended) source of truth.
Cognition is intended to be a rebuildable projection (i.e., reconstructible from the underlying source).
